changeSet.author: pdp
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE pdp_audit_digest MODIFY COLUMN id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN workspace_id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN object_id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN actor_id BINARY(16) NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_idempotency_record MODIFY COLUMN workspace_id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN response_body JSON NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_background_job MODIFY COLUMN id BINARY(16) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN workspace_id BINARY(16) NULL, MODIFY COLUMN checkpoint_data JSON NULL;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE pdp_audit_digest MODIFY COLUMN id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN workspace_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN object_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN actor_id CHAR(36) NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_idempotency_record MODIFY COLUMN workspace_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN response_body LONGTEXT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_background_job MODIFY COLUMN id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY COLUMN workspace_id CHAR(36) NULL, MODIFY COLUMN checkpoint_data LONGTEXT NULL;
